steps.title: Use vertical angles
steps.content: Vertical angles are opposite angles formed by two intersecting lines, and vertical angles have equal measures. The problem states that angle $1$ and angle $2$ are vertical angles, so their measures must match.

steps.title: Match the equal measure
steps.content: Angle $1$ measures $72^{\circ}$, so angle $2$ also measures $72^{\circ}$. The answer is A.
